paragraphs: INMARCO HY 107HD is a high-density combination packing manufactured using Aramid Fibre Yarn at the corners and PTFE Graphite Yarn at the sealing faces, reinforced with a strong Aramid core. The packing is performed under heavy load according to plunger dimensions to ensure excusive shock and extrusion in challenging application. The packing is impregnated with an anti-friction fluoropolymer dispersion and a special break-in lubricant to provide excellent chemical resistance, dimensional stability, and thermal control.

The graphite-faced construction promotes efficient heat dissipation, while the Aramid reinforced corners provide exceptional structural strength and resistance to deformation under high pressure and dynamic loading conditions. Its dense braided construction delivers superior sealability and long-term sealing reliability in aggressive chemical services.

Specifically developed for critical fertilizer plant operations, HY 107HD performs exceptionally well in carbamate and urea pump applications where chemical resistance, mechanical strength, and operational reliability are essential.

All technical information, recommendations, and performance data provided in this technical datasheet are based on current knowledge, laboratory testing, and industrial experience. Actual product performance may vary depending on operating conditions, equipment design, installation practices, process media, pressure, temperature, and application environment. Final product selection and suitability should be determined by the user based on the specific service conditions and application requirements.

sections.heading: Heavy-Duty Woven Fabric for Welding Protection and Fire Safety

750 SS Welding Blanket is a heavy-duty fabric woven from high SiO₂ content yarn (≥96%) and treated with a specially formulated acid process. This silica cloth is suitable for continuous service at 1100°C (2000°F) and can withstand short-term exposure up to 1400°C (2550°F).
paragraphs: The fabric is available with optional Polyurethane or Vermiculite coatings, which enhance abrasion resistance and tensile strength. It is ideal for heat preservation applications, firefighting equipment, fire curtains, welding blankets, fireproof garments, and high-temperature filtration systems. Style 750 SS is also widely used for manufacturing preformed fire and welding blankets with fiberglass tape edging and brass eyelets.

subsections.heading: Wiping Pad
paragraphs: High-Performance Wiping Pad for Wire Industries

INMARCO Wiping Pad is manufactured from tough yet smooth copolymer yarn, lubricated with mineral oil and fluoropolymer suspensoid, and reinforced with high-tensile inorganic filaments. Its dense and heavy-duty construction is produced on specially engineered machinery to ensure dimensional accuracy, consistent wiping performance, and extended service life in demanding wire processing applications.

Designed specifically for wire drawing and galvanizing operations, the pad delivers smooth and uniform wiping action while maintaining excellent durability under continuous operating conditions. Its advanced construction provides reliable wiping performance without compromising wire surface quality, coating consistency, or production efficiency.

The Wiping Pad offers superior wear resistance, excellent chemical compatibility, and reliable operation across a broad temperature range, making it an ideal solution for modern wire manufacturing facilities.

subsections.heading: Style CG 100
paragraphs: Advanced Graphite Technology for Superior Sealing

Style CG 100 is a high-performance braided packing manufactured from 99% pure expanded graphite fiber reinforced with non-metallic filaments. Designed for demanding industrial sealing applications, it offers outstanding resistance to extrusion, high temperatures, aggressive chemicals, and high-pressure operating conditions in both dynamic and static services.

The packing is impregnated with proprietary HiTherm dispersion, with PTFE dispersion available as an option, creating a dense and uniform sealing structure that effectively blocks leakage paths. Its self-lubricating properties allow automatic adjustment under gland pressure, reducing friction, minimizing wear, and extending equipment life.

Developed through advanced in-house research and engineering, Style CG 100 provides exceptional sealing reliability, superior thermal stability, and long-term performance under severe mechanical loads and thermal cycling conditions.

sections.heading: Flexible Corrugated Metal Sealing Solution for Flange Irregularities

INMARCO Corrugated Metal Gaskets are versatile semi-metallic sealing elements manufactured from precision-formed thin metallic sheets with concentric corrugations. The corrugated metal core is typically faced with soft sealing materials such as flexible graphite, PTFE, mica, ceramic fibre, or non-asbestos materials to enhance sealing performance and flange conformity.
paragraphs: The corrugated construction provides excellent resilience, recovery, and mechanical stability while requiring relatively low seating stress. These gaskets effectively accommodate flange irregularities, thermal expansion, vibration, and pressure fluctuations, making them suitable for demanding industrial applications.

Corrugated Metal Gaskets are widely used in chemical processing, petrochemical plants, refineries, power generation facilities, and oil & gas operations where reliable sealing under fluctuating operating conditions is essential.

sections.heading: Metal-Jacketed Sealing Solution for High-Temperature and Narrow Flange Applications

INMARCO Double Jacketed Gaskets are semi-metallic sealing solutions consisting of a soft filler material completely enclosed within a metallic outer jacket. This construction combines the compressibility and recovery characteristics of non-metallic fillers with the strength, blowout resistance, and durability of metallic materials.
paragraphs: The metal jacket protects the filler from process media while providing excellent mechanical strength and corrosion resistance. These gaskets are particularly suitable for narrow flange widths, rough or uneven flange faces, and applications involving high temperatures, thermal cycling, and aggressive process conditions.
Double Jacketed Gaskets are widely used in heat exchangers, boilers, pressure vessels, pumps, valves, steam systems, and process equipment where reliable sealing performance is essential.

subsections.heading: Flexible Pure Graphite Sheet for High-Temperature and High-Pressure Sealing
paragraphs: FG 320 is manufactured from exfoliated graphite. During the initial exfoliation process, graphite undergoes acid treatment; however, all residual acids are thoroughly removed using demineralized (DM) water. The subsequent manufacturing process is entirely mechanical and does not involve the addition of binders, fillers, oils, or other additives.

The sheet consists of 99% pure carbon graphite, providing exceptional sealing performance in demanding high-temperature and high-pressure applications. Its highly resilient structure enables it to conform to flange irregularities and surface imperfections, ensuring reliable sealing performance.

FG 320 is suitable for use with metallic, glass, and enamel flanges and is designed to facilitate easy maintenance and gasket replacement. The material remains dimensionally stable under pressure fluctuations and is also suitable for cryogenic services.

subsections.heading: High-Purity Graphite Molded Rings with Exceptional Oxidation Resistance
Product Description
paragraphs: INMARCO GM 300Z is a high-efficiency, ultra-low oxidation graphite molded ring designed for valve stem and seat sealing applications. Each ring is manufactured from flexible graphite foil with ultra-high purity (≥99.85%) and extremely low detrimental material content.

The rings incorporate advanced oxidation inhibitors and corrosion-resistant properties, meeting stringent requirements for nuclear and high-temperature service applications. They are precisely sized, density-controlled, and manufactured without binders, elastomers, or fillers, ensuring superior sealing reliability and long service life.

GM 300Z is specifically developed for critical valve applications handling high-temperature steam, hydrocarbons, heat transfer fluids, and other demanding process media where graphite purity and oxidation resistance are essential.

paragraphs: INMARCO HY 107 is a unique multi-yarn packing specifically designed for harsh industrial sealing applications. The packing combines Aramid filament yarn at the corners with graphite-lubricated PTFE yarn on the sealing faces and an Aramid filament core. The packing is performed according to plunger dimensions to ensure excusive shock and extrusion in challenging application. This engineered construction delivers the low friction characteristics of PTFE and graphite while providing superior abrasion resistance through high-strength Aramid reinforcement.

The dense braided structure ensures exceptional sealability by minimizing gaps and voids within the packing. When compressed, the packing forms a tight and reliable sealing barrier that effectively prevents fluid leakage even under demanding operating conditions.

HY 107 is designed to withstand high-pressure service while maintaining excellent dimensional stability and sealing integrity. Its outstanding resistance to abrasion, chemicals, Ammonia, and Carbamate solutions makes it suitable for a wide range of industrial applications where reliability, durability, and long service life are critical.

paragraphs: INMARCO Style HY 175 is a high-performance duplex braided packing manufactured from Red Inmalon yarn and Expanded PTFE intimately bonded with special quality graphite yarn. subsections.heading: High-Performance Serrated Metal Gasket for Demanding Industrial Applications
1. PRODUCT OVERVIEW
paragraphs: INMARCO Kammprofile Gaskets are high-performance metallic gaskets designed with a precision-machined serrated metal core and soft sealing layers bonded to both sealing surfaces. This unique construction combines the mechanical strength of metal with the superior sealing characteristics of soft facing materials, delivering exceptional sealing reliability across a wide range of pressure and temperature conditions.

The concentric serrations concentrate gasket loading and create highly effective sealing barriers while minimizing flange stress and bolt load requirements. Kammprofile gaskets offer excellent resistance to blowout, thermal cycling, pressure fluctuations, and radial shear forces, making them ideal for critical industrial applications.
The reusable metal core allows refurbishment by replacing only the soft sealing layers, significantly reducing maintenance costs and extending service life.

subsections.heading: Precision Valve Seat Seal for Critical Shut-Off Applications
Product Description
paragraphs: INMARCO Laminar Seal is a precision-engineered sealing solution specifically developed for demanding valve sealing environments, particularly Double Offset Butterfly Valves and Triple Offset Butterfly Valves.

The seal utilizes a robust Metal–Filler–Metal laminated construction, minimizing internal leak paths while providing exceptional sealing integrity under high-cycle and bidirectional flow conditions. Its pressure-activated design enhances sealing performance as system pressure increases, making it ideal for critical shut-off applications.

The combination of metallic strength and resilient sealing materials ensures excellent resistance to fire, blowout, corrosion, and thermal cycling. This design delivers long service life and reliable performance in severe operating conditions commonly encountered in the Oil & Gas, Power Generation, Nuclear, Marine, and Water Treatment industries.

paragraphs: Precision Engineered for Chemical Resistance and Thermal Stability

This advanced molecular blend combines the exceptional chemical resistance of PTFE with the thermal conductivity and lubricating properties of graphite, delivering superior sealing performance compared to conventional PTFE-graphite packings.

This unique construction prevents graphite migration and disintegration, maintains continuous lubrication, and ensures long-term structural integrity. PE 102 is particularly suitable for pumps operating without cooling water, providing reliable sealing, reduced friction, and enhanced equipment protection.

subsections.heading: Style PE 104C
paragraphs: Innovative Packing with High-Tech Materials

Style PE 104C is a high-performance gland packing specifically engineered for control valves operating under extreme industrial conditions. Designed to provide exceptional resilience, mechanical strength, and sealing reliability, it is ideally suited for high-pressure and high-temperature applications where long-term sealing performance is critical.

This sophisticated construction provides superior chemical resistance, excellent thermal stability, low friction operation, and outstanding leakage control in frequently operated control valves.

Its ability to conform to stuffing box irregularities, combined with excellent recovery characteristics and heat dissipation properties, ensures reliable sealing performance and extended service life in demanding industrial environments.

sections.heading: 1. PRODUCT OVERVIEW
paragraphs: INMARCO Ring Type Joint (RTJ) Gaskets are precision-machined metallic sealing components engineered for critical high-pressure and high-temperature applications across offshore, onshore, petrochemical, refinery, and subsea industries.

Designed for metal-to-metal sealing reliability, RTJ gaskets provide exceptional sealing integrity under severe pressure, thermal cycling, vibration, and corrosive operating conditions. The self-energizing sealing principle improves gasket performance as internal pressure increases, making RTJ gaskets highly suitable for wellhead systems, pressure vessels, subsea pipelines, and critical flange connections.

Manufactured in accordance with API 6A and ASME B16.20 standards, INMARCO RTJ gaskets are available in Oval, Octagonal, RX, and BX profiles to suit various flange groove configurations and service conditions.

The gasket materials are carefully selected to ensure compatibility with flange hardness, process media, temperature conditions, and corrosion resistance requirements, ensuring reliable long-term sealing performance in demanding industrial applications.

sections.heading: Content
paragraphs: STYLE CG 503
Advanced Sealing Solution for High-Pressure & High-Temperature Applications

INMARCO Style CG 503 is a high-performance packing manufactured from expanded graphite and carbon fiber yarn, specifically developed for high-pressure and high-temperature valve applications. The packing core is reinforced with Inconel wire and protected by a fine wire mesh jacket, while the outer layer consists of low-friction carbon yarn. This advanced construction provides excellent sealing reliability in control valves, soot blowers, and other critical industrial services.

The packing is enhanced with an inorganic passive corrosion inhibitor and a proprietary graphite-based dispersion that helps prevent galvanic corrosion, improves heat dissipation, and reduces loss on ignition. Style CG 503 readily adapts to worn or pitted sealing surfaces, maintaining effective sealing performance without causing damage to equipment surfaces. Its robust construction ensures the packing remains intact during cutting, installation, and removal, reducing maintenance time and improving operational efficiency.
KEY FEATURES
● Designed for high-temperature and high-pressure valve applications.

● Contains an inorganic passive corrosion inhibitor to protect equipment from galvanic corrosion.
● Proprietary graphite-based dispersion improves heat dissipation and sealing efficiency.
● Conforms to worn, rough, or pitted valve surfaces without causing scoring or damage.
● Remains intact during cutting and allows easy removal during maintenance shutdowns.
● Suitable for critical applications requiring reliable sealing under severe operating conditions.

sections.heading: Style CG 900
paragraphs: INMARCO Style CG 900 is a premium flexible expanded graphite fibre packing manufactured from high-purity graphite fibres with elevated carbon content. The packing incorporates an inorganic passive corrosion inhibitor that protects equipment against galvanic corrosion while minimizing loss on ignition. Its chemically inert and non-toxic composition makes it suitable for applications involving sensitive process media where contamination-free sealing is essential. The square braided structure ensures dimensional stability, uniform sealing pressure, and consistent operational reliability in both static and dynamic applications.

Style PE 509 offers excellent resistance to aggressive chemicals, thermal stress, and environmental degradation while maintaining flexibility and sealing integrity over extended operating periods. Its low dust generation and skin-friendly properties support safe handling and cleaner working environments.
The packing is environmentally safe, recyclable, and suitable for a wide variety of industrial process applications requiring dependable sealing performance and operational safety.

paragraphs: INMARCO Soft Iron Ring is a precision-machined metallic sealing component designed for high-pressure valve systems and critical sealing applications where reliable metal-to-metal sealing performance is required. Manufactured from high-quality soft iron and optionally supplied with silver-plated sealing surfaces, the ring provides excellent surface conformity and dependable sealing under severe operating conditions.

The pressure-activated sealing design utilizes internal system pressure to increase sealing efficiency as operating pressure rises. This self-tightening mechanism enables superior leak-tight performance in high-pressure valve bonnets, steam systems, pressure vessels, and other critical industrial applications.

Designed for demanding thermal and pressure cycling environments, Soft Iron Rings provide excellent dimensional stability, repeatable sealing performance, and long service life. Standard and custom dimensions are available to suit a wide range of valve and equipment designs.

sections.heading: 1. PRODUCT OVERVIEW
paragraphs: Spiral Wound Gaskets (SWGs) are high-performance metallic sealing elements designed for critical flange applications involving high temperature, high pressure, thermal cycling, vibration, and chemically aggressive media. These gaskets are engineered for applications where conventional non-metallic sealing materials are unable to maintain long-term sealing integrity under demanding operating conditions.

The gasket is manufactured by precision winding a V-shaped metallic strip together with a soft filler material such as graphite, PTFE, or mica in a controlled spiral configuration. This alternating metal–filler structure provides an optimum combination of strength, flexibility, and recovery, ensuring reliable sealing performance under fluctuating pressure and temperature conditions.

The metallic winding provides structural reinforcement and blowout resistance, while the soft filler ensures effective sealing by conforming to flange surface irregularities. This results in consistent sealing stress retention throughout thermal expansion, pressure cycling, and mechanical vibration.

Spiral Wound Gaskets are widely used across oil & gas, petrochemical, power generation, chemical processing, marine, and heavy industrial applications where safety and sealing reliability are critical.

sections.heading: 1. PRODUCT OVERVIEW
paragraphs: INMARCO TYPE 600 is a premium-grade 100% Virgin PTFE material manufactured for demanding industrial sealing, insulation, chemical handling, and engineering applications requiring exceptional chemical resistance, thermal stability, and low-friction performance.

Available in multiple forms including skived sheets, moulded sheets, rods, tubes, rings, and custom-machined components, TYPE 600 offers excellent inertness against most industrial chemicals and aggressive media.

PTFE is inherently non-flammable, chemically inert, and highly stable across a wide operating temperature range. Its extremely low coefficient of friction, excellent release characteristics, and outstanding electrical insulation properties make it ideal for critical applications in chemical processing, pharmaceuticals, food processing, electrical systems, oil & gas, and general industrial environments.
TYPE 600 can be easily machined, fabricated, or moulded into customized sealing and engineering components while maintaining excellent dimensional stability and long-term operational reliability.

sections.heading: 1. PRODUCT OVERVIEW
paragraphs: INMARCO ULTRA FE 1003 is an advanced ultra-low emission combination packing set engineered for critical valve sealing applications requiring extremely low leakage, virtually zero friction, superior fire safety, and long-term operational reliability under severe industrial service conditions.

The packing set is manufactured using expanded graphite Inconel wire mesh jacketed yarn for end rings combined with graphite foil ribbon molded intermediate rings. The advanced construction delivers exceptional sealing integrity, pressure resistance, thermal stability, and ultra-low fugitive emission performance while maintaining minimal friction under extended cycling conditions.

The packing is impregnated with a proprietary high-temperature emulsion to ensure extremely low friction characteristics and may additionally incorporate an inorganic passive corrosion inhibitor to support corrosion-free long-term operation.

ULTRA FE 1003 is globally recognized as one of the most advanced fugitive emission packings, qualified to API 622 3rd Edition standards packing is specifically designed for demanding industrial services including hydrocarbons, steam, aggressive gases, high-temperature fluids, and supercritical CO₂ applications.

sections.heading: 1. PRODUCT OVERVIEW
paragraphs: INMARCO ULTRA LE 1002 is a premium low-emission braided packing manufactured from high-purity expanded graphite fibre yarn with minimum carbon 99%. Each yarn is reinforced with multiple Inconel wires and externally jacketed with Inconel wire mesh to provide exceptional mechanical strength, thermal stability, extrusion resistance, and sealing reliability under severe operating conditions.

The packing is thoroughly incorporated with inorganic passive corrosion inhibitors and specialized lubricating agents. The corrosion inhibitor system protects parent equipment against galvanic corrosion while minimizing oxidation-related material degradation during high-temperature operation.

The reinforced graphite construction enables ULTRA LE 1002 to withstand extreme mechanical stress, thermal cycling, pressure fluctuations, and oscillating valve movement while maintaining reliable sealing integrity and ultra-low emission performance.

Designed for critical industrial valve applications, ULTRA LE 1002 delivers long sealing life, reduced maintenance, excellent fire-safe performance, and superior fugitive emission control in demanding process environments.

sections.heading: 1. PRODUCT OVERVIEW
paragraphs: INMARCO ULTRA LT 1004 is an advanced ultra-low friction PTFE-based fugitive emission combination packing set specifically engineered for low-temperature and cryogenic industrial applications requiring reliable low-emission sealing performance under extreme operating conditions.

The packing set is manufactured using PTFE filament braided intermediate rings combined with precision-engineered PTFE sintered end rings. The packing is impregnated with a proprietary high-temperature emulsion and in-built solid lubricants to achieve exceptionally low friction characteristics, even under sub-zero operating temperatures and extended cycling conditions.

The engineered profile of the end rings ensures uniform load transfer across the packing set, delivering superior sealing efficiency, reduced leakage, and long-term operational reliability. Virgin PTFE construction provides outstanding chemical compatibility across a wide range of aggressive industrial media.

ULTRA LT 1004 is designed to deliver ultra-low emission performance, reduced energy consumption, minimal maintenance requirements, and reliable sealing integrity for critical low-temperature valve applications.
